# Copilot Project Agent Rules

Use the project-specific directives under `.cursor/rules/` when working in this repository.

## Rules

Apply the architecture and implementation rules in `.cursor/rules/`, especially:

- `.cursor/rules/app-architecture.mdc`
- Layer rules in `.cursor/rules/layer-*.mdc`
- Concept rules in `.cursor/rules/controller.mdc`, `operation.mdc`, `validation.mdc`, `viewmodel.mdc`, `component.mdc`, `state.mdc`, `gateway.mdc`, `service.mdc`, and `model.mdc`

These rules describe the Vayeate Theme Studio layering, mutation flow, naming, dependency injection, and per-concept file conventions.
